changes: Fixed a crash on launch that could occur when preparing an empty local database for agent sync
Fixed a rare crash when stopping a recording or changing audio devices mid-capture
Fixed an intermittent crash when stopping recording caused by audio teardown racing the live capture thread
Fixed chat answers inserting a stray space into code like pd.DataFrame when normalizing sentence spacing
Fixed a crash that could occur when a paired BLE device sent a corrupt or malformed data packet
Fixed a crash when a window reported a zero-area frame while the app was capturing screen context
Redesigned Screen Recording setup with a compact animated Omi drag-to-enable helper
Improved recovery guidance when the desktop AI runtime or a selected local provider cannot start
Fixed clear voice delegation requests to start the requested agent directly without repeated confirmation
Improved recording reliability when reconnecting after a conversation finishes.
Fixed the Home screenshot counter appearing unavailable during app startup
Fixed the app freezing for several seconds on its first launch when the network was slow, and stopped a slow first launch from pinning beta installs to the stable update channel
Improved push-to-talk recovery after silent microphone capture
Push-to-talk now shows transcription progress, clearer failure reasons, and backup-transcription notices when realtime falls back
Fixed push-to-talk turns spoken while the voice connection was still warming up getting stuck thinking with no reply
Fixed realtime voice to prioritize fresh screen captures and reliably handle the first push-to-talk after launch
Fixed Calendar, Gmail and Apple Notes imports failing to extract anything, and chat turns erroring out, when a message merely mentioned something like "today" plus "schedule"
Fixed duplicate sign-in prompts appearing in Home chat after a session expires
Added maintainer-approved desktop preview apps that can be installed and tested side-by-side
Improved PTT higher-model answers by preserving the current conversation context
